description: This video introduces Web 1.0, the first version of the web, characterized by static, text-based pages created in the early 1990s. It highlights the limited interactivity available to users, primarily through text-based chat and forums.
topic_summary: Web 1.0, known as the Read Only Web, was designed for information consumption with minimal user interaction. It laid the groundwork for understanding the evolution to Web 2.0 and Web3 [t=22:32].
